summary: Tested Buchhaltung & Mahnwesen Module (v42) - All backend APIs (30/30 tests passed) and frontend UI working correctly. Buchungen CRUD, Kategorien, Statistiken, CSV Export, Kassenbuch, Monatsabschluss, Invoices CRUD, Overdue/Due-Soon, Dunning (Mahnwesen 3 Stufen) all functional. Fixed Invoice model to include dunning_history, dunning_fee, dunning_custom_text fields.
seed_data_creation: Test buchungen and invoices created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buchhaltung & Mahnwesen Module fully tested and working. Backend: All CRUD endpoints for /api/buchhaltung/buchungen, /api/buchhaltung/kategorien, /api/buchhaltung/statistiken, /api/buchhaltung/kassenbuch, /api/buchhaltung/monatsabschluss, /api/buchhaltung/export-csv, /api/buchhaltung/offene-posten, /api/buchhaltung/plausibilitaet, /api/invoices (CRUD), /api/invoices/overdue, /api/invoices/due-soon, /api/invoices/{id}/dunning all working. Frontend: Navigation via sidebar 'Buchhaltung' and 'Rechnungen', all 6 Buchhaltung tabs (Übersicht, Buchungen, Kassenbuch, Offene Posten, Monatsabschluss, USt/MwSt), Rechnungen tabs (Alle Rechnungen, Mahnwesen), Neue Buchung modal with all form fields, Zeitraum filters, CSV export button all working.

backend_apis.POST /api/buchhaltung/buchungen (Einnahm: PASS - Creates with auto belegnummer, MwSt calculation
backend_apis.GET /api/buchhaltung/kassenbuch: PASS - Returns entries with running saldo
backend_apis.GET /api/invoices/overdue: PASS - Returns overdue invoices with days_overdue
backend_apis.GET /api/invoices/due-soon: PASS - Returns invoices due in 3 days
backend_apis.POST /api/invoices: PASS - Creates invoice with positions, calculates totals

frontend_features.navigation_buchhaltung: PASS - 'Buchhaltung' link in sidebar, navigates to /buchhaltung
frontend_features.navigation_rechnungen: PASS - 'Rechnungen' link in sidebar, navigates to /invoices
frontend_features.buchhaltung_tabs: PASS - All 6 tabs present (Übersicht, Buchungen, Kassenbuch, Offene Posten, Monatsabschluss, USt/MwSt)
frontend_features.buchhaltung_buchungen: PASS - Shows buchungen list with search
frontend_features.buchhaltung_neue_buchung_modal: PASS - Opens with all form fields (Typ toggle, Kategorie, Datum, Beschreibung, Netto, Brutto)
frontend_features.invoices_tabs: PASS - Both tabs present (Alle Rechnungen, Mahnwesen)
frontend_features.invoices_mahnwesen: PASS - Shows 'Keine überfälligen Rechnungen' when empty

model_fix_applied.change: Added dunning_fee, dunning_custom_text, dunning_history fields to Invoice model
model_fix_applied.reason: These fields were being stored in MongoDB via $push but not returned in API response due to response_model filtering
